title: Excalibur | Mowzie's Mobs Support
description: The ultimate retexture of old-world beasts
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09d16efa0247fc8d213055e1e150b99633da975_0.webp)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Mowzie's 
Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   This extensive pack overhauls every mob, boss, item, particle, boss bar and even GUI.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*   bobmowzie – Creator of _Mowzie's Mobs_
*   TC – For his textures from _Excalibur Simply Swords_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-mowzies-mobs-support)
